issue_title: [Bug Report]The Page component is used in the Dropdown component. Dropdown is triggered by the click method. If there is a click on the front 5 pages of the Page component or 5 pages backward, the drop-down content is retracted.
issue_body_preview:
### Environment
windowns10/chrome/vue2.x

### Reproduction link
[https://run.iviewui.com/1d3NvtwV](https://run.iviewui.com/1d3NvtwV)

### Steps to reproduce
1. The Page component is used in the Dropdown component, and Dropdown uses the click method to trigger
2. Click on the front 5 pages or
test_description_zh: 在 Dropdown 组件内嵌套 Page（分页）组件，Dropdown 的触发方式设置为 click。打开下拉菜单后，点击 Page 组件中的「向前5页」或「向后5页」快速跳转按钮，观察 Dropdown 下拉内容是否保持展开状态。
expected_result_zh: 点击分页组件的「向前5页」或「向后5页」按钮后，Dropdown 下拉内容应保持展开状态，不应自动收起，分页页码正常更新。
